title: Learn should ignore one-off paragraph rewrites
why_this_case_exists: We want to stop learn from turning page-specific rewrites into global rules.
setup: The repository is a Git repo.
The target file already exists in HEAD and is modified in the working tree.
The reviewer rewrote a paragraph for this page only, not as a reusable translation rule.

input.source_block: 本页介绍如何初始化项目。
input.before_translation: This page describes how to initialize the project.
input.after_translation: This guide walks you through the initial setup for this project so your team can get started faster.

expected: The edit is ignored or explicitly marked non-reusable.
No new rule is added to playbook.md or memories/en.md from this change.
should_not_happen: The page-specific rewrite becomes a permanent memory rule.
The tool invents a generic style rule to justify this single edit.
